title: Career Opportunity Teacher at StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies:
StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies!
